text:

x11-themes/kde-icons-nuovext2 UNBREAK (this time for sure!)

Gah!
I'm *so* sorry for the bother!

I'm afraid I confused the prior version of it.
In other words, yes, it's *supposed* to be v3, not v2.
Fixed!
Please disregard the last patch (svn diff). This one is fine.

Once again, sorry for the bother.

All the best.

--Chris
